channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Patna Spice Trader Killed During Night-time Power Outage, Police Investigating
item.description: In a tragic incident in Patna, Bihar, a local spice trader named Pintu Kumar was shot dead during a late-night power outage. According to police sources, unidentified assailants opened fire on him, an...

item.title: Coalition outlines six key policy proposals in response to Australia’s federal budget
item.description: Opposition leader Angus Taylor delivered his first budget reply speech, outlining the Coalition’s plans to reshape several key areas of Australian policy. He criticised the federal government’s budget...

item.title: Borno Governor Zulum Rejects Senate Ambition to Preserve Party Unity
item.description: Borno State governor, Prof Babagana Umara Zulum, don clear say e no gree to dey contest for Senate seat in 2027 elections despite heavy pressure from supporters, family, and friends. Zulum talk this o...

item.title: Discrepancy Arises Over Wes Streeting's NHS Performance Claims
item.description: The article addresses claims made by Wes Streeting regarding his performance in meeting NHS targets, suggesting that the official data contradicts his statements. Streeting, a prominent political figu...

item.title: Accessing Your Mail & Guardian Digital Edition
item.description: The Mail & Guardian has made its digital edition available for readers through a PDF format. Subscribers and non-subscribers alike are guided to click on the provided image to view the edition. The ar...

item.title: Angus Taylor focuses on immigration and welfare in budget response
item.description: In his recent budget reply speech, Angus Taylor has placed a strong emphasis on immigration, particularly targeting non-citizen welfare recipients. The Coalition's approach reflects ongoing debates ab...

item.title: PSL Title Race Remains Wide Open as Season Nears End
item.description: The 2026 Premier Soccer League (PSL) season has delivered one of the most competitive campaigns in recent years. For the first time in nearly a decade, Mamelodi Sundowns appear on the brink of losing ...

item.title: Expert says Bato’s moves could impact Duterte’s interim release request
item.description: An expert has raised concerns that actions taken by former police chief Bato Dela Rosa could negatively influence former President Rodrigo Duterte’s bid for interim release. The legal proceedings surr...

item.title: Five Dead in MP Firecracker Factory Explosion; Authorities Launch Detailed Investigation
item.description: In Dewas district of Madhya Pradesh, a firecracker factory blast has claimed the lives of five workers after two more injured employees succumbed to their injuries in hospital, bringing the total deat...

item.title: Dar es Salaam Stock Exchange Week 9 2026 Sees Record Market Capitalisation Despite Two-Day Trading Pause
item.description: During Week 9 of 2026, the Dar es Salaam Stock Exchange (DSE) faced technical challenges that stopped trading on Tuesday and Wednesday. Despite this, the market remained very bullish and Total Market ...

item.title: Information Minister Tarar Denounces External Campaigns Against Pakistan’s Role in Regional Peace
item.description: ISLAMABAD: Pakistan's Information Minister Attaullah Tarar has strongly criticised what he calls a 'coordinated negative information campaign' originating from abroad aimed at undermining Pakistan’s e...

item.title: Jannik Sinner Achieves Record Winning Streak at 2026 Italian Open ATP Masters 1000
item.description: Due to restricted access to the original article, detailed reporting is unavailable. However, based on the title, the key highlight is that Italian tennis player Jannik Sinner achieved a record-breaki...

item.title: Rwanda Strengthens Position as Regional Investment Gateway
item.description: Rwanda inazidi kuimarisha juhudi zake za kuwa kituo kikubwa cha uwekezaji kwa Afrika Mashariki, ikitegemea utulivu wa serikali, utendaji wa sheria na urahisi wa kuunganishwa na nchi jirani. Maafisa wa...

item.title: Tanzania advances digital customs reforms to boost trade efficiency
item.description: Tanzania's Finance Minister Khamis Mussa Omar has urged for faster adoption of digital customs reforms and stronger regional cooperation as African countries face pressure to modernize trade systems. ...

item.title: Democrats miss key vote on Trump's Iran war powers amid absences
item.description: Several Democratic lawmakers were absent during a critical House vote regarding President Donald Trump's war powers in Iran, prompting concern among party leadership. Axios reported that the absence o...

item.title: A Tribute to Marianna Hill: Iconic Roles and Timeless Portraits from the 1960s and ’70s
item.description: Marianna Hill, an American actress renowned for her exotic beauty and captivating screen presence, emerged as a memorable figure in 1960s and 1970s cinema and television. Hill’s performances ranged fr...

item.title: Ghana Arranges Evacuation of 300 Nationals Amid Rising Xenophobic Tensions in South Africa
item.description: Ghana has announced plans to repatriate 300 of its citizens from South Africa due to a recent wave of xenophobic incidents and anti-immigrant protests. The decision, approved by President John Dramani...

item.title: CBI Investigates Insider Links in NEET-UG 2026 Paper Leak Case
item.description: The Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) has expanded its probe into the NEET-UG 2026 paper leak, concentrating on a possible 'insider role' within the examination process. Following the cancellation...

item.title: Kwara APC House of Reps Aspirants Call for Fair Selection Process
item.description: Six aspirants wey dey seek APC ticket for Baruten–Kaiama Federal Constituency for Kwara State don reject any plan wey fit impose candidate on dem. For meeting wey happen on Thursday, May 14, 2026, all...

item.title: WNBA Board Approves Sale of Connecticut Sun to Tilman Fertitta; Team Will Relocate to Houston After 2026 Season
item.description: The WNBA and NBA boards of governors have unanimously approved the sale of the Connecticut Sun from the Mohegan Tribe to Houston Rockets owner Tilman J. Fertitta. The team will remain in Connecticut f...
